messages.content: design patterns are reusable solutions to common software problems singleton ensures only one instance factory creates objects without specifying the class observer notifies dependents of state changes and strategy selects algorithms at runtime patterns improve code maintainability and communication between developers

sorting algorithms arrange elements in order common ones include bubble sort which repeatedly swaps adjacent elements quicksort which uses a pivot to partition merge sort which divides and merges and heapsort which uses a binary heap quicksort is often fastest in practice with average time complexity o n log n

a database is an organized collection of data stored and accessed electronically relational databases use tables with rows and columns and sql for queries nosql databases include document stores key value stores and graph databases indexing and normalization improve query performance and reduce redundancy

a regular expression or regex is a pattern that matches text strings it uses special characters like dot for any character star for zero or more plus for one or more and brackets for character sets regex is used for searching validation and text replacement in most programming languages

http or hypertext transfer protocol is the foundation of web communication it uses request response cycles where a client sends a request with a method like get post put or delete and the server returns a response with a status code like 200 ok 404 not found or 500 server error https adds encryption via tls

recursion is when a function calls itself to solve a problem by breaking it into smaller subproblems each recursive call must have a base case that stops the recursion otherwise it runs forever example factorial of n equals n times factorial of n minus 1 with base case factorial of 0 equals 1

an api or application programming interface defines how software components interact rest apis use http methods and json data graphql lets clients request exactly the data they need apis enable integration between different systems and are fundamental to modern web and mobile development

version control tracks changes to files over time allowing collaboration and rollback git is the most popular system with concepts like repositories commits branches and merging each commit is a snapshot branches allow parallel development and merge requests combine changes
